portfolio_rationale: Tech/growth/crypto saw sharp drawdowns last week while defensives (Healthcare, Staples, Low-Vol, REITs) led. With hot April CPI/PPI, May CPI release June 10, and FOMC June 16-17 inside the window, I tilt defensive to outperform SPY which carries heavy mega-cap tech weight.
rationale_summary: Defensive rotation portfolio designed to outperform a tech-heavy SPY during a week loaded with inflation data and an FOMC decision at the exit close.
